faqs.question: At what age can children start Karate classes?
faqs.answer: Children can generally begin structured Karate training from approximately five years of age. The most suitable batch depends on the child’s age, attention level and physical readiness.

faqs.question: Do students need previous Karate experience?
faqs.answer: No. OliveHorse Fitness Academy offers beginner-friendly programmes for children, teenagers and adults with no previous martial arts experience.

faqs.question: Is the trial class really free?
faqs.answer: Yes. New students can attend one introductory trial class free of charge. Advance booking is required so the academy can recommend the correct batch.

faqs.question: How early should I book a trial class?
faqs.answer: Trial classes should be booked at least 24 hours in advance. Availability depends on the student’s age group and current batch capacity.

faqs.question: What should a student wear for the trial class?
faqs.answer: Comfortable sportswear that allows free movement is suitable for the trial class. A Karate uniform is not required for the first session.

faqs.question: When will a Karate uniform be required?
faqs.answer: The instructor will explain uniform requirements after enrolment. Students should purchase the recommended uniform before regular grading or formal training activities.

faqs.question: Are the classes safe for children?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sessions are conducted in a structured and supervised environment. Students learn techniques progressively, and controlled practice is used to reduce unnecessary risk.

faqs.question: How many students are included in each batch?
faqs.answer: The academy maintains small and manageable batch sizes wherever possible so instructors can provide students with better observation and feedback.

faqs.question: Are separate batches available for children and adults?
faqs.answer: Yes. The academy offers separate age-based batches for children, teenagers and adults. Women’s self-defence workshops and private coaching are also available.

faqs.question: Can adults join without being physically fit?
faqs.answer: Yes. Adult beginners can start at their current fitness level. Training intensity is gradually increased according to ability, health, mobility and experience.

faqs.question: Does Karate help with weight management?
faqs.answer: Karate training can support weight management by increasing regular physical activity, mobility, strength and cardiovascular fitness. Results also depend on consistency, nutrition, sleep and general lifestyle.

faqs.question: Do you provide women-only self-defence sessions?
faqs.answer: Yes. OliveHorse Fitness Academy conducts practical women’s self-defence workshops in a safe and supportive training environment.

faqs.question: Do you offer private Karate coaching?
faqs.answer: Yes. One-to-one coaching is available for students who need personalised attention, flexible timings, technical improvement, belt preparation or competition-focused training.

faqs.question: How often should students attend classes?
faqs.answer: Most students benefit from attending two or three structured classes per week. The recommended frequency depends on the programme and the student’s goals.

faqs.question: How does belt progression work?
faqs.answer: Students progress through belt levels based on regular attendance, discipline, technical development, fitness and readiness. Belt examinations are conducted when the instructor believes the student has completed the required preparation.

faqs.question: Do you prepare students for Karate competitions?
faqs.answer: Yes. Competition preparation is available for interested and eligible students. Training may include Kata, controlled partner work, conditioning, timing, movement and performance feedback.

faqs.question: Do you conduct workshops for schools and companies?
faqs.answer: Yes. Custom Karate, fitness, awareness and self-defence workshops are available for schools, colleges, companies and other organisations.

faqs.question: How far in advance should group workshops be booked?
faqs.answer: General group workshops should be booked at least seven days in advance. School and corporate workshops should preferably be booked at least fifteen days in advance.

faqs.question: What are the monthly Karate class fees?
faqs.answer: Kids group classes generally range from ₹1,500 to ₹2,500 per month. Teen and adult classes generally range from ₹2,000 to ₹3,500 per month. Final fees depend on the selected programme and batch.

faqs.question: Is there a registration fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. A one-time registration fee of ₹500 applies after enrolment.

faqs.question: Can I change my batch later?
faqs.answer: Batch changes may be possible depending on age group, level, schedule and available capacity. Students should discuss the request with the academy.

faqs.question: Where is OliveHorse Fitness Academy located?
faqs.answer: The academy is located on the second floor of Sunrise Fitness Centre, near Santacruz Railway Station, Santacruz West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400054.

faqs.question: Which areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: Students commonly visit from Santacruz East, Santacruz West, Khar, Bandra, Vile Parle, Juhu, Kalina, Vakola, Andheri West and Andheri East.

faqs.question: How can I book a class?
faqs.answer: You can book through the website enquiry form or contact OliveHorse Fitness Academy directly on WhatsApp.
